title: Prime Video drops full trailer for Spider-Noir
summary: Prime Video has released a full trailer for Spider-Noir, a new series featuring a detective with spider powers. The show promises a unique blend of detective storytelling with superhero elements.
content: It's "a detective story, but the detective happens to also have spider powers.”—EP Chris Miller

zh.title: Prime Video 发布《蜘蛛侠：黑色契约》完整预告片
zh.summary: Prime Video 发布了新剧《蜘蛛侠：黑色契约》的完整预告片，该剧以一位拥有蜘蛛能力的侦探为主角。该剧结合了侦探故事叙述与超级英雄元素，承诺呈现独特的观看体验。

title: Trump turns the WHCD shooting into a pitch for the White House ballroom
summary: Hours after an armed gunman attempted to breach the White House Correspondents' Dinner, President Trump used the security incident to justify his proposed White House ballroom renovation, arguing it would provide better security than existing venues. This demonstrates Trump's tendency to leverage events for his political agenda.
content:
President Donald Trump speaks during a press conference while flanked by FBI Director Kash Patel and Secretary of Homeland Security Markwayne Mullin at the White House on April 25, 2026. | Nathan Howard/Getty Images.	

Within hours of an armed gunman's attempt to enter the White House Correspondents Dinner, attended by top administration officials and hundreds of journalists, President Donald Trump did what he does best: use the assassination attempt to defend his ballroom project. 
During a White House press conference just hours after he and several cabinet members were evacuated, Trump told reporters that the Washington Hilton, the hotel where the WHCD historically takes place, was "not a particularly secure building. And I didn't want to say this, but this is why we have to have all of the attributes of what we're planning at the White House. It's act …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 特朗普将白宫记者晚宴枪击事件转变为推销白宫宴会厅的平台
zh.summary: 在武装枪手试图突破白宫记者晚宴后数小时内，特朗普总统利用这一安全事件为其提议的白宫宴会厅翻新进行辩护，声称这将提供比现有场地更好的安全保障。这反映了特朗普利用事件推进政治议程的倾向。

title: TechCrunch Mobility: Elon’s admission
summary: TechCrunch Mobility covers developments in the transportation sector, including news related to Elon Musk. The column serves as a central hub for transportation industry insights and trends.
content: Welcome back to TechCrunch Mobility — your central hub for news and insights on the future of transportation.

zh.title: TechCrunch Mobility：埃隆的认可
zh.summary: TechCrunch Mobility 涵盖了交通运输行业的发展，包括与埃隆·马斯克相关的新闻。该专栏是交通运输行业见解和趋势的中心枢纽。

title: Tomora’s Come Closer is an ecstatic love letter to 90s dance music
summary: Tomora, a collaboration between Norwegian singer Aurora and Tom Rowlands of the Chemical Brothers, delivers an energetic performance celebrating 90s dance music aesthetics. The artist pair created an entrancing techno-influenced set that impressed viewers at Coachella.
content:
Before Coachella, Tomora wasn't on my radar at all. It's actually only by chance that I stumbled upon them - I opened the wrong stream because my TV was lagging like a MFer. I paused for a few moments, entranced by the two ethereal Nordic women banging on giant drums to a techno beat. I made a mental note to check them out the following weekend, because Drain was the priority (especially since the Sonora stage wasn't streaming on weekend two). It was only later that I would find out that Tomora is a collaboration between Norwegian singer-songwriter Aurora and Tom Rowlands, one-half of the Chemical Brothers.
Suffice it to say, they were incr …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Tomora的《Come Closer》是对90年代舞蹈音乐的狂喜情书
zh.summary: Tomora是挪威歌手Aurora与化学兄弟乐队Tom Rowlands的合作，呈现了庆祝90年代舞蹈音乐美学的充满活力的表演。这对艺术家创作了一场迷人的科技影响音乐表演，给Coachella观众留下了深刻印象。

title: To buy this Bay Area home, you’ll need Anthropic equity
summary: A 13-acre property in Mill Valley, just north of San Francisco, is being offered with an unusual payment option allowing buyers to use Anthropic equity as currency. This reflects the Bay Area real estate market's creative approaches to transactions involving tech company equities.
content: Someone’s offering an unusual deal for a 13-acre property in Mill Valley, just north of South Francisco.

zh.title: 要购买这套湾区房产，你需要Anthropic股权
zh.summary: 位于旧金山以北Mill Valley的13英亩房产以不寻常的支付选项出售，允许买家使用Anthropic股权作为货币。这反映了湾区房地产市场在涉及科技公司股权交易中的创意方法。

title: SpeakOn’s dictation device is a good idea marred by platform limitations
summary: SpeakOn offers a $129 MagSafe-compatible dictation device that attaches to iPhones to enable transcription across applications. While the hardware concept is promising, platform limitations restrict its functionality and usefulness for broader transcription needs.
content: This $129 device uses MagSafe to stick on the back of an iPhone to power transcription across apps

zh.title: SpeakOn的听写设备是个好主意，但受平台限制而受阻
zh.summary: SpeakOn提供了一款129美元的MagSafe兼容听写设备，可连接到iPhone上实现跨应用程序的转录功能。虽然硬件概念很有前景，但平台限制限制了其功能和对更广泛转录需求的实用性。

title: Skylight’s 15-inch smart calendar is down to its lowest price to date
summary: The Skylight Calendar 2, a 15-inch smart display that syncs multiple calendar services, is currently on sale for $259.99 (down $40) through May 7th. The device offers family-friendly organization features including shared calendars, chore charts, and weather forecasts through its touchscreen interface.
content:
Skylight’s color-coded smart calendar supports two-way syncing with Google Calendar, Microsoft Outlook, and Apple’s iCloud calendar, among others. | Image: Skylight	

When you’re juggling more than just your own calendar, staying organized can be overwhelming. Fortunately, the Skylight Calendar 2 can help simplify things by syncing multiple calendars in a single spot, and now through May 7th, it’s available directly from Skylight for $259.99 ($40 off), its best price to date.
Skylight Calendar 2

Where to Buy:

 $299.99 $259.99 at Skylight

Skylight’s 15-inch smart calendar improves upon the original with a brighter screen, faster performance, and a slimmer design with swappable magnetic frames. Otherwise, though, it offers the same core experience, making it easy for the whole family to see events at a glance, whether you mount it on a wall or place it on a kitchen counter using the included adjustable stand. It automatically syncs with Google, Apple, Yahoo, Outlook, and Cozi calendars, pulling them into a single shared space that updates automatically. Each household member gets their own color, too, so it’s easy to keep track of who’s doing what.
In addition to event planning, the Calendar 2 makes it easier to arrange and assign other day-to-day tasks. You can create and manage shared chore charts, grocery lists, and to-do lists directly on the touchscreen device or through the mobile app for Android and iOS, which makes it easy for everyone in your household to stay on track and contribute. Skylight also provides detailed weather forecasts for your events, so you know what to expect before heading out.
If you subscribe to Skylight’s Calendar Plus plan, the Calendar 2 takes even more of the work off your plate. You can forward emails, upload PDFs, or snap photos of flyers and automatically turn them into calendar events. You also get meal planning tools that let you plan breakfast, lunch, dinner, and snacks for the week, as well as the ability to assign chores an

zh.title: Skylight 15英寸智能日历降至历史最低价
zh.summary: Skylight Calendar 2是一款15英寸智能显示屏，可与多个日历服务同步，目前正在进行促销，价格为259.99美元（下降40美元），促销期至5月7日。该设备通过触摸屏界面提供家庭友好的组织功能，包括共享日历、家务列表和天气预报。

title: After three months on Linux, I don’t miss Windows at all
summary: A tech writer shares their positive experience after three months using Linux as their primary operating system, finding it stable and reliable enough that they've only needed Windows twice for specific tasks. The piece demonstrates that Linux has matured to the point where it can serve as a viable alternative to Windows for everyday computing.
content:
Some relevant reading.	

In January I finally made good on my threat/promise to install Linux on my desktop. I wanted to see how far I could get using a Linux PC as my main computer without doing a bunch of research beforehand or troubleshooting afterwards. Since then I have booted into Windows exactly twice: once to scan a multipage document that wasn't scanning right in Linux, and once to print a photo for my kids' school on extremely short notice. There's a reason it's taken me three months to write the next installment in my Linux diary: nothing has gone horribly wrong.
It didn't take long for my Linux install to stop feeling new and exciting and start feeling  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 使用Linux三个月后，我一点都不怀念Windows
zh.summary: 一位科技写手分享了他使用Linux作为主要操作系统三个月后的积极体验，发现Linux足够稳定可靠，他只在两次特定任务中需要Windows。这篇文章表明Linux已经成熟到可以作为Windows的可行替代品用于日常计算的程度。

title: The plan to quietly kill Coyote v. Acme blew up in David Zaslav’s face
summary: Warner Bros. Discovery under CEO David Zaslav shelved nearly-completed films including live-action Batgirl and Scoob! Holiday Haunt as part of a debt management strategy involving tax write-offs. The plan to quietly eliminate the projects faced public backlash and reportedly backfired.
content:
This is The Stepback, a weekly newsletter breaking down one essential story from the tech world. For more on Hollywood trends and streaming culture, follow Charles Pulliam-Moore. The Stepback arrives in our subscribers' inboxes on Sundays at 8AM ET. Opt in for The Stepback here.
How it started
Under David Zaslav's leadership, WBD got very into the practice of shelving its own nearly completed projects in order to cash in on subsequent tax write-offs. To help deal with its looming debt and operating costs, the studio killed Adil El Arbi and Bilall Fallah's live-action Batgirl feature and the Scoob! Holiday Haunt movie from Michael Kurinsky  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 大卫·扎斯拉夫悄悄扼杀《土狼大战阿卡美》的计划事与愿违
zh.summary: 华纳兄弟探索公司首席执行官大卫·扎斯拉夫将包括真人版《蝙蝠女侠》和《史酷比假日闹鬼》在内的近乎完成的电影搁置，作为涉及税务注销的债务管理策略的一部分。该公司悄悄消除这些项目的计划遭到公众强烈反对，据报导事与愿违。

title: New robotic control software avoids jamming their joints
summary: New robotic control software enables robots with different hardware configurations to learn from each other's experiences without jamming their joints. This breakthrough could improve the efficiency and adaptability of robotic systems in diverse applications.
content: Software lets robots learn from each other even if they have different hardware.

zh.title: 新型机器人控制软件防止关节卡顿
zh.summary: 新的机器人控制软件使具有不同硬件配置的机器人能够相互学习经验而不会卡住关节。这一突破可能会提高机器人系统在各种应用中的效率和适应性。
